title: coristospermum lucidum
intro: Coristospermum lucidum is a species of flowering plant in the family Winteraceae, native to New Zealand. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anthelmintic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Coristospermum lucidum include its potential to treat gastrointestinal issues, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Coristospermum lucidum are typically made from its leaves and roots, which can be used to create teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal purposes.
